title: Warm up
content: The slide shows images representing Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image portrays a unique aspect of the cities.
key_claims: Beijing is associated with modern and traditional elements.
Chongqing is shown with a focus on reading or knowledge.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide focuses on the evolution of a nation's urban landscapes through imagery. It highlights the varied architecture and cityscapes in China.
key_claims: Images show diversity from traditional buildings to modern taxis.
China's urban areas are evolving significantly.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide maps out a strategy for investigating and researching city features. It connects local features with development strategies to achieve positive outcomes.
key_claims: Focus on positive impact and outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide presents different development strategies for Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each city has a specific focus: technology, sustainability, or tourism.
key_claims: Chongqing focuses on sustainable urban development.
Hangzhou is oriented towards tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide summarizes the different development focuses of the three cities through the perspective of taxi drivers. Each city uses local features to promote development.
key_claims: Each city uses unique strategies based on local features.
Focuses include sustainable urban development, tourism, and technology integration.
